6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"How It Works"}]
7:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embed"}],": Query text is converted to a vector via OpenAI embeddings"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," performs approximate nearest neighbor search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Score"}],": Cosine similarity between query and stored vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank"}],": Results ordered by similarity (highest first)"]}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}]
9:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# OpenAI embeddings (default)\nmem = Memory(embedding_model=\"text-embedding-3-small\")\n\n# Or use local embeddings (no API calls)\nmem = Memory(\n  embedding_model=\"sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2\",\n  local_embeddings=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Supported Models"}]

c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Direct Vector Queries"}]
d:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"# Search by text (auto-embeds)\nresults = mem.vector_search(\"deployment strategy\")\n\n# Search with custom vector\nresults = mem.vector_search(vector=my_custom_vector)\n\n# Filtered vector search\nresults = mem.vector_search(\n  \"deployment strategy\",\n  tags=[\"infrastructure\"],\n  threshold=0.7,  # Minimum similarity\n)\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Index Management"}]
